basic_details.job_title: AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 26 DEO, Accountant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech & Hearing Disabilities (AYJNISHD)
basic_details.short_information: Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech & Hearing Disabilities (AYJNISHD) DEO, Accountant and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.ayjnishd.nic.in. A total of 26 vacancies have been announced through the AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026.

important_dates.application deadline: 21 days from the date of publication of advertisement

age_limit.details: Reader (Speech Pathology) Group -A: Maximum Age 45 years. Rehabilitation Officer, Group - A: Maximum Age 30 years. Lecturer (Education), Group - A: Maximum Age 35 years. Lecturer (Audio/Speech Pathology), Group - A: Maximum Age 35 years. Vocational Counsellor, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Social Welfare Officer, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Accountant, Group - B: Maximum Age 35 years. Extension Service Assistant, (Clinical Psychology), Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Extension Service Assistant (Social Work), Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Computer Programmer, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Technical Assistant (Audio/ Visual), Group -B: Maximum Age 30 years. Psychologist, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Office Superintendent Cum Accountant, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Data Entry Operator, Group - B: Maximum Age 30 years. Director (Consultant): Maximum Age 62 years. Assistant Professor (Speech, Lang. Pathology) (Consultant): Maximum Age 56 years. Lecturer in Special Education (IDD) (Consultant): Maximum Age 56 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate and Post Graduate degrees in relevant fields.
qualification.details: Reader (Speech Pathology) Group -A: M.Sc. or equivalent post graduate in Audiology & Speech Language Pathology.. Rehabilitation Officer, Group - A: Degree of a recognized University or its equivalent, Diploma in Social work or vocational guidance or post graduate degree in social work or sociology. Lecturer (Education), Group - A: Master Degree in any subject and M. Ed. (HI) degree with not less than 55% marks or an equivalent Grade of ‘B’ in seven-point scale Lecturer (Audio/Speech Pathology), Group - A: M.Sc. in Speech & Hearing. Vocational Counsellor, Group - B: Degree of recognized University or its equivalent and Diploma in Social work / Vocational Guidance, Post Graduate degree in Social work / Sociology Social Welfare Officer, Group - B: Master Degree in Social Welfare Accountant, Group - B: B. Com with first class from recognized University with 7 years’ experience in Accounts Department, M. Com from recognized University with 5 years’ experience in Accounts Extension Service Assistant, (Clinical Psychology), Group - B: M.A with Clinical Psychology. Extension Service Assistant (Social Work), Group - B: Master of Social Work (MSW) of any Govt. recognized Institute. Computer Programmer, Group - B: Master’s degree in Science, Maths, Statistics, Operation Research, Commerce or Economics with post graduate diploma in Computer Science. Technical Assistant (Audio/ Visual), Group -B: Bachelor’s Degree in Commercial from any recognized University with knowledge of Photography, Video Camera Operation,. Psychologist, Group - B: M.A. in Clinical Psychology. Office Superintendent Cum Accountant, Group - B: Degree of recognized University. Data Entry Operator, Group - B: Graduation, Diploma / Certificate in Computer Science. Director (Consultant): Post Graduate Degree in Special Education or any other discipline from a recognized University/Institution with 55% marks or equivalent grade with 10 years experience of research or rehabilitation or administration in the field of Disability. Assistant Professor (Speech, Lang. Pathology) (Consultant): M.Sc. (Sp.& Hg.) / M.A SLP / M.Sc.(Speech Language Pathology) or its equivalent.. Lecturer in Special Education (IDD) (Consultant): Masters in Social Sciences, Humanities & Sciences, M.Ed. Spl. Ed.(ASD / ID / SLD), B.Ed. Spl. Ed.(ASD / ID / SLD), DMR / DSE (ASD / ID / SLD) / D.ED. Spl. Ed (ASD / ID / SLD)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AYJNISHD DEO, Accountant and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.ayjnishd.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the AYJNISHD Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 29-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the institute by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 26 vacancies announced for various posts in the Ali Yavar Jung National Institute of Speech & Hearing Disabilities (AYJNISHD) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for AYJNISHD posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Graduate degree. However, specific posts may require Post Graduate degrees in relevant fields as per the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AYJNISHD posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies for different posts, ranging from a maximum of 30 years to 62 years. Please refer to the detailed notification for specific post-wise age limits.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure ranges from Pay Level 6 to Pay Level 11 as per the 7th CPC, and some consultant positions offer consolidated salaries. Specific details are available in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I download the application form for AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of AYJNISHD, which is www.ayjnishd.nic.in.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Self-attested photocopies of mark sheets, certificates, proof of age, experience, and category proof are required. Refer to the notification for a complete list.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for AYJNISHD Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: As per the available information, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based, as indicated in the recruitment details for AYJNISHD.
